comment: I should have known by the flippant person on the phone that the work would be less than par. The edges started crumbling after the first rain and they unapologetically refused to fix it.
draft_response: Brittany, we are genuinely concerned to read this. Every client's experience matters to us, and we want to understand what happened. Please call us directly at (817) 995-0324 so we can discuss this and find a path forward.
